name: Regulus Resources Inc.
description: Regulus Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company formed in 2010 by the former management team of Antares Minerals Inc. The company is primarily focused on the advancement of its flagship AntaKori copper-gold-silver project, located in the Yanacocha-Hualgayoc mining district of Northern Peru. Regulus aims to create value through the exploration and development of large-scale mineral deposits. The company is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol REG and maintains a strategic approach to project development, including partnerships and technical resource estimation to maximize the potential of its assets.
